counter_rationale: The initial verdict of true_positive may be premature. The flow duration of 89 microseconds could be within the normal range for legitimate keep-alive connections to internal load balancers. The high packet rate could reflect a monitoring tool or internal health check rather than an attack. Without source IP reputation data, the attribution is uncertain.
weakest_evidence: Flow duration alone is insufficient to distinguish DoS from legitimate high-frequency internal traffic. Port 80 is used by many benign services.
